item.description: EraBritish Invasion (with the Beatles, 1963–1970); solo, 1968–2002InstrumentLead guitar, slide guitar, sitar, vocalsGenresRockPop rockFolk rockBandsThe BeatlesTraveling WilburysListenRYM·Apple Music·Spotify George Harrison played as if notes cost money.

item.title: Burt Bacharach
item.description: Era1957–2023GenresPop soulBrill BuildingTraditional popFilm scoreListenRYM·Apple Music·Spotify Burt Bacharach is the most harmonically sophisticated songwriter in the history of American pop — the figure who brought Ravel, Debussy, and Brazilian bossa nova into the three-minute single without sacrif...

item.title: The Beatles
item.description: SceneMerseybeatEraBritish Invasion (1963–1970)MovementBritish beat boomGenresPop rockPsychedelic popArt rock Playlist: FAB RYM · Apple Music · Spotify One chord opens A Hard Day’s Night, and no two musicians have ever agreed how to name it.
